title: Trader's argot
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Trader's argot''' was a collection of most of the [[Language/Legends|languages]] used by the [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Full of slang terms and grammatical errors, not even a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] could comprehend this integration of languages used by the traders.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]''

[[Category:Trade languages]]
